name: add-a-milestone
goal: Add a milestone (a dated diamond) to the plan and place it on a target date.

steps.note: Nothing is selected. A first-time user scans the docked app bar for how to add a milestone: is there a visibly labelled Milestone affordance in the INSERT group (SR-IXC-13)?
Click the Milestone button in the app bar INSERT group to create one.
Was a milestone created and auto-selected so I can immediately place it (the app bar should switch to the MILESTONE context)?
Hover the freshly created milestone: is a move/drag affordance or drag cursor shown so I know I can reposition it directly (SR-IXC-13)?
Drag the milestone about a week to the right to place it on the target date. Expect a date pill following the drag live (SR-IXC-04) and the date snapping to whole days (SR-IXC-12).
Did the milestone move to the new date by direct dragging, with no numeric date stepper required (SR-IXC-01)?
Press Esc to deselect and return to the default context (SR-IXC-09).
Confirm the surface is back to a neutral default state.
